name: Stereotaxis, Inc.
business: Stereotaxis designs, manufactures and markets robotic systems, instruments and information systems for the interventional laboratory. Its primary clinical focus is electrophysiology, specifically cardiac ablation procedures for the treatment of arrhythmias. The company sells to hospitals and physicians globally.

exposures.sentence: Stereotaxis designs, manufactures and markets robotic systems, instruments and information systems for the interventional laboratory.

Our proprietary robotic technology, Robotic Magnetic Navigation, fundamentally transforms endovascular interventions using precise computer-controlled magnetic fields to directly control the tip of flexible interventional catheters or devices.

Synchrony digitizes and modernizes the interventional cath lab with a 4K high-definition display that consolidates the viewing and control of disparate systems in the lab, offering enhanced procedure experience with custom layouts, streamlined workflows, an intuitive user interface, and a decluttered environment.

catalysts.event: Completed acquisition of Access Point Technologies EP, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2024, the Company completed its acquisition of all the shares of capital stock of Access Point Technologies EP, Inc., a Minnesota corporation ( APT ), from APT Holding Company, Inc., a Minnesota corporation.

catalysts.event: Attained CE Mark for GenesisX RMN System
catalysts.sentence: In the third quarter of 2024, we attained CE Mark for the GenesisX RMN System.

catalysts.event: Genesis RMN system received regulatory approval from China's NMPA
catalysts.sentence: In November 2024, the Genesis RMN system, our current generation system, received regulatory approval from China s National Medical Products Administration (NMPA), and our partner MicroPort received the regulatory clearances for their integrated mapping system and novel ablation catheter.

catalysts.event: MAGiC catheter obtained CE marking in Europe
catalysts.sentence: The Stereotaxis MAGiC catheter, a robotically navigated magnetic ablation catheter designed to perform minimally invasive cardiac ablation procedures, obtained the CE marking in Europe during the first quarter, 2025.
MAGiC Sweep , the first robotically navigated high-density EP mapping catheter, received U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) 510(k) clearance in July 2025.

catalysts.event: Attained CE Mark for Synchrony Solution
catalysts.sentence: In October, 2025, we attained CE Mark for the Synchrony Solution.

catalysts.event: GenesisX RMN System received FDA 510(k) clearance
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025 we received FDA 510(k) regulatory clearance within the United States.
The Stereotaxis MAGiC catheter ... U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) 510(k) clearance in January, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Over 5.0 million people in the U.S. suffer from arrhythmias.
tamClaims.sentence: Over 5.0 million people in the U.S. currently suffer from abnormal heart rhythms, which are known as arrhythmias.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly 1.5 million cardiac ablation procedures annually in over 7,000 labs worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe more than 7,000 interventional labs around the world are currently conducting nearly one and a half million cardiac ablation procedures annually.

tamClaims.claim: Over 4 million interventional cardiology procedures annually in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: Over 4 million interventional cardiology procedures are performed annually in the U.S. alone.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 10-15% of interventional cardiology procedures are complex.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that approximately 10-15% of these interventional cardiology procedures currently being performed are complex.
